raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Teachers in the California State Teachers' Retirement System (CalSTRS) who retired before 1999 receive comparatively less benefits than their peers who retired in the early 2000’s or after.",
    "The Supplemental Benefit Maintenance Account (SMBA) holds a projected excess of $11.2 billion in funds.",
    "SB 868 would equitably distribute excess funds within CalSTRS' Supplemental Benefit Maintenance Account to California's oldest retired teachers that are most in need.",
    "Ensuring educators can retire with dignity and security after decades of service to public-school students is critical to attracting and retaining teachers and school staff.",
    "SB 868 helps California’s oldest teachers, who feel inflation the most, sustain financial security in their senior years."
  ]
}
```
